name: KB Prep Tool
description: Convert raw local files into clean Markdown for Obsidian or LLM Wiki use. It does not build indexes, generate wiki pages, or harvest remote sources.

max_cpu_threads.description: Max CPU threads for CPU-mode inference. Default 4.

min_free_memory_gb.description: Min free memory GB before batch pauses. Default 4.

mineru_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for a single MinerU conversion subprocess. Default 1140.

python_path.description: Optional absolute path to a base Python executable used only to create the plugin-local .kbprep/venv runtime.
